name: Space Express Loops
summary: Turn your room into a high-stakes spatial logistics hub!  Space Express Loops brings an interplanetary mail network onto your furniture. Draw automatic flight paths between spawning planets, optimize dynamic Hubs, and watch the cash fly. Don't let outposts overflow, or your empire collapses. Master precise Bezier navigation, manage multi-colored sectors, and survive Jim’s proprietary snark.  Can you build the ultimate shipping route without crashing into your coffee table?
